---

Review title tags and descriptions
Review and optimize page content
Add a keyword H1 tag to each page
Create title tag with longtail keyword
Write meta description with keywords
Create URL with primary keyword
Link to other pages on your website
Use outbound links when relevant
Optimize image titles and alt text
Add schema markup for rich content
Include relevant YouTube videos
Research recurring content themes
Write an headline to grab attention
Create sections with H2 headers
Write strong introduction paragraph
Add table of contents page links
Include relevant images throughout
Create schedule for updating content
ONPAGE SEO
Research competitor’s backlinks
Publish guest articles or blogs
Get PR and press coverage (HARO)
Create a standalone blog (Medium)
Create YouTube videos and link
Create various social posts and link
Create articles on article directories
Research content link opportunities
Actively increase online company reviews
Creative links (awards, testimonials, etc)
Contribute to industry forums and Quora
Post repurposed content on directories
OFFPAGE SEO
